nasb.text: And he sent out his slaves to call those who had been invited to the wedding feast, and they were unwilling to come.

esv.text: and sent his servants  to call those who were invited to the wedding feast, but they would not come.

cnv.text: 他派僕人去叫被邀請的人來參加婚筵。但他們不肯來。

ccb.text: 他派奴仆去请受邀的客人，可是客人都不肯赴宴。

csbs.text: 他派了奴仆们去叫那些被邀请的人前来赴宴，可是他们不肯来。
